task.summary: offset switch complete, pre surrounding cells mapping
pre general clean up of styling
post general cleanup 2 and speed corrections
pre refactor of the play-pause-step buttons
pre switch to more precise drawing
moved growth_types out of constant and into menu directive
implemented zeroclipboard to copy the log out of the app
mouse toggle versus tick toggle log implemented
some variable renaming prior to timer refactor
now only redraws when needed instead of on constant timer
moved log type constant to board directive
log cell position implemented but not changeable from 1-1
log cell position and color are now adjustable

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: log cell position and color are now adjustable
